song.title: Jesus Messiah
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G Am7 He became sin who knew no sin . G/B C That we might become His righteousness . G Am7 He humbled Himself and carried the cross
[P] .G C G C Love so amazing | Love so amazing
[C] . G C Jesus Messiah, name above all names . G D Blessed Redeemer, Emmanuel . G C The rescue for sinners | The ransom from Heaven . G/b Dsus G C Jesus Messiah, Lord of all
[V2] . G Am7 His body, the bread His blood, the wine . G/B C Broken and poured out all for love . G Am7 The whole earth trembled and the veil was torn
[B] . Am G/B C D All our hope is in You | All our hope is in You . Am G/B C D All the glory to You, God | The light of the world
